Class VerifyService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.verify.api.VerifyService
public class VerifyService extends Object
High-level service for handling player verification. Wraps the VerifyClient and handles error mapping and data extraction from the API envelopes.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VerifyService(VerifyClient client)
    Constructs a new VerifyService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<VerificationResponse>
    checkVerification(UUID uuid)
    Checks the verification status of a player and maps API errors to meaningful reasons.
    CompletableFuture<Map<String, VerificationResponse>>
    checkVerificationBatch(Collection<UUID> uuids)
    Checks the verification status of multiple players.

    • VerifyService

      public VerifyService(VerifyClient client)
      Constructs a new VerifyService.
      Parameters:
      client - the VerifyClient to use for API calls

  • Method Details

    • checkVerification

      public CompletableFuture<VerificationResponse> checkVerification(UUID uuid)
      Checks the verification status of a player and maps API errors to meaningful reasons.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's Mojang UUID
      Returns:
      a future containing the verification response

    • checkVerificationBatch

      public CompletableFuture<Map<String, VerificationResponse>> checkVerificationBatch(Collection<UUID> uuids)
      Checks the verification status of multiple players.
      Parameters:
      uuids - a collection of player UUIDs
      Returns:
      a future containing a map of UUID strings to verification responses
